coverage.source_line_definition: non-blank physical lines in supported source files

limitations: This is a structural API-surface proxy, not an API quality score or verdict.
JavaScript CommonJS assignments (for example module.exports), computed exports, and dynamic export patterns are not covered.
Python publicness is a convention proxy: module-level names not beginning with an underscore are treated as public; __all__ is not interpreted.
Go visibility is a lexical proxy based on an identifier beginning with an uppercase Unicode character; package reachability is not resolved.
Documentation attachment is adjacency-based and language-aware; generated, macro-expanded, inherited, detached, and non-comment documentation is not resolved.
Export lists and re-exports are inventoried as re-export rows; their target declaration signatures are not resolved.

symbols.visibility_or_proxy_basis: Rust public trait member; containing trait is publicly reachable
